title: So many ways to pay. So many ways to splurge.
notes: Payment method option within eBay's managed payments system, accepted alongside credit/debit cards, Google Pay, PayPal

title: Contacting a seller
notes: Feature allowing buyers to contact sellers before or after purchase via 'Contact seller' button in Seller Information section or purchase history

title: eBay Guaranteed Fit
notes: eBay Motors program guaranteeing automotive parts/accessories fit buyer's vehicle or free returns within 30 days, covers most parts/accessories for cars, trucks, motorcycles (excludes tires/wheels)

title: Choose a Selling Format
notes: Listing format where buyers place bids and highest bidder wins when auction ends, ideal for collectibles, antiques, limited items where market determines price

title: eBay Authenticity Guarantee
notes: Multi-point inspection program with independent expert verification for eligible items, eBay covers all authentication costs

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Sneakers
notes: Authentication for select sneaker brands (Yeezy, Jordan, Nike, adidas, etc.) in new/pre-owned condition starting at $75 ($100 for baby shoes category)

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Watches
notes: Authentication for wristwatches sold for $2,000+ (optional $80 buyer-paid service for $500-$1,999.99), includes verification of movement, crown, bezel, dial, case, clasp, serial number

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Handbags Sellers
notes: Authentication for select handbag brands sold for $500+ in new/pre-owned condition (optional buyer-paid service for $200-$499.99), returns also inspected before being sent back to sellers

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Trading Cards
notes: Authentication for sports trading cards, collectible card games, autograph/relic cards, non-sports cards $250+ for ungraded and graded autograph/relic cards

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Jewelry
notes: Authentication for select unbranded/branded jewelry and loose diamonds sold for $500+ in new/preowned condition

title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers
notes: Price negotiation feature allowing buyers to propose offers and sellers to accept, decline, or counter; sellers can set auto-accept/decline rules and minimum acceptable amounts

title: All about bidding
notes: Proxy bidding system where buyers enter maximum bid and eBay automatically bids incrementally on their behalf to maintain high bid position using minimum necessary amount

title: Promoted Listings Advanced
notes: Advanced targeting controls within Promoted Listings Advanced strategy providing priority ad placements to reach highly motivated buyers, cost-per-click model

title: Automatic Payments
notes: Automatic payment processing for sellers (managed payments with automatic payouts on daily/weekly/biweekly/monthly schedule) and buyers (payment plans like Klarna with automatic installments)

title: Scan to List
notes: Mobile app feature allowing sellers to scan barcodes (UPC, ISBN, MPN) to identify products and auto-fill listing details from eBay catalog, particularly useful for trading cards

title: Seller Performance Standards
notes: Seller performance status when defect rate or cases closed without seller resolution exceed eBay's minimum standards, results in lower search placement, pending funds, potential selling limits with 3-month grace period for improvement

title: Automatic bidding
notes: Preset amount by which bids are raised in auctions, smaller increments for low-price items and larger for high-price brackets, used in eBay's automatic bidding system

title: eBay Coupon
notes: Annual promotional event offering discounts and coupons during Black Friday shopping period, historical example shows 25% off promotion with $50 maximum discount

title: eBay Services: Bidder Block FAQ
notes: Seller tool allowing blocking up to 5,000 usernames to prevent specific buyers from bidding/purchasing items, blocked buyers cannot contact seller unless seller initiates, accessed via Account Settings > Selling Preferences

title: Selling is now even easier with AI
notes: AI-powered image editing tool for listings allowing automatic background replacement with solid white color, backdrop transformation, brightness/contrast adjustment, available in web and mobile app

title: Aste di beneficenza: prima di iniziare
notes: eBay Italy charity auction program for non-profit associations with special 1.3% final value fee plus €0.25 per order, 7-day duration recommended, raised over €8.5 million since 2001

title: Bons Plans: high-tech, maison, jardin, pièces auto, et bien plus
notes: eBay France deals hub featuring discounts up to 40% across categories including high-tech, home, garden, and auto parts with free shipping on many items

title: Australia Post on eBay
notes: Shipping integration offering up to 20% discount on Australia Post International Standard and Express services through eBay Labels, eBay Plus sellers receive $4 express contribution for metro deliveries
